response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and systems, including C++ and cloud-related work, but lacks direct experience in large-scale distributed systems, compute technologies, or hardware architecture at the scale required for this role. Leadership experience is present but primarily in full-stack development rather than cloud infrastructure or technical mentorship of cloud/DevOps teams.
strengths: Strong C++ experience across multiple roles, including contributions to LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments.
Demonstrated ability to work in high-performance environments (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at dunnhumby).
Proven leadership in mentoring and organizing technical workshops (e.g., Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos).
concerns: No explicit experience with cloud architecture or compute technologies at production scale (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure).
Limited direct experience in hardware architecture, storage systems, or networking at the required level.
Leadership experience is primarily in full-stack development rather than cloud infrastructure or DevOps mentorship.
